plugins.name: write-a-prd
plugins.description: Create a PRD through user interview, codebase exploration, and module design, then submit as a GitHub issue.

plugins.name: prd-to-plan
plugins.description: Turn a PRD into a multi-phase implementation plan using tracer-bullet vertical slices, saved as a local Markdown file in ./plans/.

plugins.name: prd-to-issues
plugins.description: Break a PRD into independently-grabbable GitHub issues using tracer-bullet vertical slices.

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Interview the user relentlessly about a plan or design until reaching shared understanding, resolving each branch of the decision tree.

plugins.name: design-an-interface
plugins.description: Generate multiple radically different interface designs for a module using parallel sub-agents.

plugins.name: request-refactor-plan
plugins.description: Create a detailed refactor plan with tiny commits via user interview, then file it as a GitHub issue.

plugins.name: triage-issue
plugins.description: Triage a bug or issue by exploring the codebase to find root cause, then create a GitHub issue with a TDD-based fix plan.

plugins.name: improve-codebase-architecture
plugins.description: Explore a codebase to find opportunities for architectural improvement, focusing on making the codebase more testable by deepening shallow modules.

plugins.name: migrate-to-shoehorn
plugins.description: Migrate test files from `as` type assertions to @total-typescript/shoehorn.

plugins.name: scaffold-exercises
plugins.description: Create exercise directory structures with sections, problems, solutions, and explainers that pass linting.

plugins.name: setup-pre-commit
plugins.description: Set up Husky pre-commit hooks with lint-staged (Prettier), type checking, and tests in the current repo.

plugins.name: git-guardrails-claude-code
plugins.description: Set up Claude Code hooks to block dangerous git commands (push, reset --hard, clean, branch -D, etc.) before they execute.

plugins.name: write-a-skill
plugins.description: Create new agent skills with proper structure, progressive disclosure, and bundled resources.

plugins.name: edit-article
plugins.description: Edit and improve articles by restructuring sections, improving clarity, and tightening prose.

plugins.name: ubiquitous-language
plugins.description: Extract a DDD-style ubiquitous language glossary from the current conversation, flagging ambiguities and proposing canonical terms. Saves to UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md.

plugins.name: obsidian-vault
plugins.description: Search, create, and manage notes in the Obsidian vault with wikilinks and index notes.

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: Interactive QA session where user reports bugs or issues conversationally, and the agent files GitHub issues. Explores the codebase in the background for context and domain language.

plugins.name: github-triage
plugins.description: Triage GitHub issues through a label-based state machine with interactive grilling sessions.
